hints.description: This utility company provides electric and natural gas services to customers primarily in Missouri and Illinois. They operate through two main segments: Electric and Gas, delivering power and fuel to residential, commercial, and industrial clients. The company is notable for its significant infrastructure investments and focus on renewable energy initiatives within the Midwest.
hints.funFact1: The company traces its roots back to 1850 with the founding of the Union Electric Light & Power Company, initially providing electric street lighting to St. Louis, Missouri – a pioneering effort in the early days of electricity.
hints.funFact2: CEO **** ******* has championed a significant expansion of the company’s wind energy portfolio, aiming to power over 800,000 homes with renewable energy by 2020.
